posts.author: MeadowWalker72
posts.text: Hey everyone, quick question about my account! I need to reset my password and verify my payment details urgently. Please DM me your login info or reply with the security code to [link removed]. Thanks in advance! #accounthelp #urgent
posts.explanation: This post is a clear credential-harvesting attempt, asking directly for a password and security code via a suspicious link. It requires immediate removal.
